chapters.completeness_note: Complete canonical-witness transcription through the end of 論正官取運 on Gengcun Ji PDF page 60. The six period paragraphs are retained as full source attestations and explicitly excluded from natal lifecycle compilation.

Complete transcription of the surviving canonical-witness text. Gengcun ji PDF page 69 contains a likely homoeoteleuton between the F7 and F8 audit slots; the diplomatic segments preserve that witness lacuna and do not import absent wording from other witnesses.

Complete pattern-label, chart-identity, and pillar transcription of all 93 visible plates on Gengcun Ji PDF pages 91-102. Working interpretations of the short plate annotations are excluded until separately verified, and no generic rule is inferred. Page 99 includes one residual plate outside the ruled frame. 格局命式附表 is an editorial catalogue title because the witness supplies no collective heading.

commentary_boundary.note: The layer name shen_core follows the project contract; the undated Gengcun Ji witness itself names no author. No Xu Lewu or other later commentary is silently merged into these slices. Headings and methodological closings are marked editorial, and chart cases are marked example.

determinism.jsonl: one object per line with no blank lines

month_command_candidate_routing.description: The engine confirms a main-qi month-command candidate and preserves a secondary/residual-qi match only as possible. This routing distinction is an ontology policy under the source-backed month-command framework, not wording asserted to be explicit in the scanned chapter prose.

errata.note: Qin witness PDF pages 160-164 are publisher advertisements, accession material, and endpapers. They are not the 論建祿月劫 chapter and supply no production doctrine mapping.

lifecycle_exclusions.reason: 化官為印缺少已裁定的轉化事實，不從組合結果推斷轉化。
廣義刑沖破害尚不能把損害綁定到同一正官成格路徑，且會反駁薛例陽性夾具。
廣義地支會合救應尚不能解析並解除同一個已發生的支關係損害。
減官與洩官的底本異文未裁定，不編譯效果。
匿名命例只進入精確四柱證言，不生成通用財印損害規則。
金例的清配置保留為例證，不從原始藏干或歷史結果生成通用純度規則。
范例的部分巳丑會金與雙作用分配只進入精確四柱證言，不生成通用部分三合。

locators.column_line: left folio, right-to-left columns 1-4
locators.quote: 用神專尋月令然以四柱配之有成敗

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 成中有敗必是帶忌敗中有成全凭救應

locators.column_line: right folio through left folio, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 何謂救應如官逢傷而透印以解之

locators.column_line: right-to-left columns 1-10
locators.quote: 用神專尋月令以四柱配之必有成敗

locators.column_line: right-to-left columns 1-9
locators.quote: 八字妙用全在成敗救應其中權輕權重甚是活變

locators.column_line: right-to-left columns 1-4
locators.quote: 用神專求月令然以四柱配之必有成敗

locators.column_line: right-to-left columns 1-10
locators.quote: 何謂敗官逢傷尅刑冲官格敗也

locators.column_line: right-to-left columns 1-10
locators.quote: 何謂救應如官逢傷而透印以解之

locators.column_line: left folio, right-to-left columns 1-4
locators.quote: 官以尅身雖與七煞有別終受彼制

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 若財印不兩用則單用印不若單用財

locators.column_line: right folio, right-to-left columns 1-7
locators.quote: 以丁合壬而財去以丙制傷而官清

locators.column_line: left folio, heading and right-to-left columns 1-7
locators.quote: 取運之道一八字則有一八字之論其理甚精其法甚活

locators.column_line: right folio, right-to-left columns 1-8
locators.quote: 佩印運喜財鄉傷食反吉若官重身輕而佩印

locators.column_line: right-to-left columns 1-8
locators.quote: 官以尅身雖與七煞有別終受彼制

locators.column_line: right-to-left columns 1-10
locators.quote: 若財印不兩用則單用印不若單用財

locators.column_line: right-to-left column 1
right-to-left columns 1-8
right-to-left columns 1-10
locators.quote: 若財印不以兩用則單用印不若單用財

locators.column_line: right-to-left columns 1-3
locators.quote: 至若地支刑冲會合可解已見前篇

locators.column_line: left folio, heading column
both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 有財旺生官者身強而不透傷官不混七煞

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 有財帶七煞者或合煞存財或制煞生財

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 財格取運卽以財格所就之局分而配之

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 印綬喜其生身正偏同為美格

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 有印多而用財者印重身強透財以抑太過

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 印格取運卽以印格所成之局分而配之

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 食神本屬洩氣以其能生正財所以喜之

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 食神取運卽以食神所成之局分而配之

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 七煞之格局亦不一煞用食制者上也

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 有煞無食制而用刃當者

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 有煞而襍官者或去官或去煞取清則貴

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 偏官取運卽以偏官所成之局分而配之

locators.column_line: left folio, heading column
left folio, right-to-left columns
both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 有傷官佩印者印能制傷

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 有傷官用煞印者傷多身弱

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 有傷官用官者他格不用金水獨宜

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 傷官取運卽以傷官所成之局分而配之

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 然亦有官煞制刃帶傷食而貴者何也或是印護

locators.column_line: both folios, right-to-left columns
locators.quote: 陽刃用財格所不喜然財根深而用傷食以轉刃生財

left folio, heading column

locators.quote: 祿劫用官干頭透出為奇又要財印相隨不可孤官無輔

normalization_policy.method: declared deterministic replacement mapping; multi-character editorial resolutions are applied before single-character mappings
normalization_policy.note: No OpenCC dependency is used. Canonical lexical readings, marginal corrections, and witness variants remain in diplomatic_text; normalized_search_text never replaces diplomatic_text.
